section_miscategorizations.text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in 25 minutes.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A follow-up interval of 25 minutes is atypical and likely reflects the duration of the current visit or a documentation artifact rather than a true future-care plan. If it is meant as the length of the current encounter, it would not belong in the Plan. However, this does not substantially distort the clinical meaning of the note.
